name: why
description: Explains why code exists, grounded in real git history. /why <file>[:<line>|:<start>-<end>]
author: Why contributors

commands.name: why
commands.description: Explain why a piece of code exists, using git history and PR data.

optional.gh: Enables richer narratives by fetching PR descriptions and linked issues. Without it, the plugin falls back to commit-message-only output.
